rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.054, which governs parental notice and consent for school-community guidance centers. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Before a student is admitted to a school-community guidance center, the administrator of the center must notify the student's parent or guardian that the student has been assigned to attend the center.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict detected.
